basics.name: Li Mingyu
basics.label: Undergraduate Student
basics.summary: Junior undergraduate at Tongji University, School of Mechanical Engineering and Robotics. GPA 4.23, CET-6 510. Researching robotic grasping, embedded vision, and intelligent manufacturing.

work.name: Tongji University Research Group
work.summary: Research on robotic grasping and embedded vision systems.
highlights: Led dexterous hand zero-shot visual grasping project
Participated in robotic arm embedded control research
Participated in intelligent manufacturing simulation project
School of Mechanical Engineering and Robotics
Excellent grades in core major courses

awards.title: National-level Competition Awards
awards.summary: Multiple national-level competition awards in robotics and engineering.

publications.name: ICARM 2025 Paper (First Author)
publications.summary: First-author paper published at IEEE International Conference on Advanced Robotics and Mechatronics.

projects.name: Dexterous Hand Zero-Shot Visual Grasping
projects.summary: Led a research project on zero-shot visual grasping using dexterous robotic hands, integrating computer vision with robotic manipulation.

projects.name: Robotic Arm Embedded Control
projects.summary: Participated in embedded control system development for robotic arms, focusing on real-time control and sensor integration.
